title: Python Data Structure Operations Decision Flow
description: A flowchart that guides the user on the expected outcomes and rules when performing operations (like +, -, *, etc.) between different core Python data structures used in data science (Series, DataFrame, scalar).
relationships: Operation between a DataFrame and a Series aligns the Series index with the DataFrame columns and broadcasts down the rows.
Operation between two DataFrames performs element-wise operations on matching column names and indices.
Operation between a scalar and any structure applies the operation to every element.
